# Adova Synapse

> Atlanta-based Fractional AI Officer for mid-market companies ($5M-$50M revenue). Embedded AI leadership on a monthly retainer.

Adova Synapse runs your AI stack as your outsourced AI department. We embed into mid-market teams to audit tools, kill what's wasting money, and build the systems worth building. Monthly retainer model, not project work.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Fractional AI Officer for Atlanta mid-market companies.
- [About](/about): Team, mission, and founder Eli Abraham.
- [Assessment](/assessment): $1,500 AI Opportunity Assessment — paid 1-week diagnostic with prioritized opportunities and dollar estimates.
- [Services](/services): Assessment, three Fractional AI Officer retainer tiers ($5K/$8K/$12K monthly), and project-based AI System Builds.
- [Enterprises](/enterprises): Fractional AI Officer retainer pricing for $5M-$50M+ companies.
- [Contact](/contact): Book a free strategy call.
